{
  "description": "BOFT configuration files generated by script. Each file configures BOFT (Butterfly OFT) for a specific base model, dataset and block_size.",
  "note": "BOFT uses block_size and block_num parameters. block_size * block_num should equal the layer dimension (e.g., 4096 for LLaMA2-7B). The butterfly_factor parameter controls the number of butterfly factors (1 = vanilla OFT).",
  "parameters": {
    "boft_block_size": "Size of each OFT block",
    "boft_block_num": "Number of OFT blocks per injected layer",
    "boft_n_butterfly_factor": "Number of butterfly factors (default=1)"
  }
}
